START TRADING WITH A LEADING REGULATED BROKER

Octonair is a regulated Forex broker that offers traders access to the international Forex market through leading foreign exchange liquidity providers.

With Octonair you will get ultra-fast trade execution, as well as RAW ECN interbank level spreads. Combined, these elements offer clients a true institutional trading experience using a wide range of trading instruments.

Clients can access a wide range of markets through the powerful MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5 platforms , WebTrader, as well as mobile trading applications for iPhone and Android.

INCREASE YOUR TRADE ADVANTAGE WITH Octonair.

Trade with the lowest possible costs

Thanks to our raw ECN account, our traders can enjoy the lowest trading costs in the industry. We fully understand the importance of reducing trading costs so that you can make more profits.

Feel the difference with Octonair today.

OPEN A REAL ACCOUNT

FOREX BROKER
OF A NEW GENERATION

  • Lowest trading costs

  • Welcome bonus 50%

  • Lightning-fast execution

  • Award-winning 24/7 support

  • Free Forex signals

  • Negative balance protection

TRADE ANYWHERE, ANYTIME

MetaQuotes' user-friendly MT4 and MT5 apps are ideal for both new and experienced traders who want to access the markets on the go. They are fast, reliable and compatible with both Android and iOS devices. All Octonair clients can enjoy the same set of features both on a mobile device and in MetaTrader for PC and Mac. These include one-click trading, multiple order types, instant access to over 1,000 trading assets, and much more.

The Octonair app is available on IOS and Android.

UPGRADE TO Octonair
TODAY AND EXPERIENCE THE DIFFERENCE

    TO LEARN MORE

  • Registration

    Select the account type and submit your application.

  • Replenishment

    Top up your account using a wide range of top up methods.

  • Trade

    Access over 1000 instruments across all asset classes via MT4/MT5.

That's it, it's so easy to open a Forex trading account and.
Welcome to the world of trading!
OPEN A REAL ACCOUNT

About us

Octonair is a global, multi-asset broker offering clients access to a nimble and powerful service for trading CFDs on Forex, Commodities, Indices, Shares.

With more than 10 years of market experience and headquartered in Zurich, Octonair now has over 1,000 staff across more than 30 global offices.

Octonair is more than a broker. It provides a trusted trading ecosystem that enables clients to achieve their own success, in a faster and simpler manner.

Be empowered to better capitalise on winning market opportunities when you trade smarter @octonair.

Funding methods

Top-rated care
4

Contact us

[email protected]

Thurgauerstrasse 40, 8050 Zürich, Switzerland

  • Legal documents
  • Data protection notice
  • Privacy policy
  • AML policy

Octonair is a member of The Financial Commission, an international organization engaged in the resolution of disputes within the financial services industry in the Forex market.

Risk Warning: Trading derivatives carries significant risks. It is not suitable for all investors and if you are a professional client, you could lose substantially more than your initial investment. When acquiring our derivative products, you have no entitlement, right or obligation to the underlying financial assets. Past performance is no indication of future performance and tax laws are subject to change. The information on this website is general in nature and doesn't take into account your personal objectives, financial circumstances, or needs. Accordingly, before acting on the advice, you should consider whether the advice is suitable for you having regard to your objectives, financial situation and needs. We encourage you to seek independent advice if necessary. Please read our legal documents and ensure that you fully understand the risks before you make any trading decisions.

Regional Restrictions: We do not offer our services to residents of certain jurisdictions such as China, Romania, Singapore, the United States and to jurisdictions on the FATF and EU/UN sanctions lists. For more information please refer to our FAQ page.

The information on this site and the products and services offered are not intended for distribution to any person in any country or jurisdiction where such distribution or use would be contrary to local law or regulation.

While the Authority has granted a securities or derivatives investment business licence to the Licensee, the Authority does not endorse or vouch for the merits of the products offered by the Licensee.
